name: UKD Jellyfin
author: TorrelUKD
description: Cinematic TV-first Jellyfin theme with projection-room identity, Elms Sans typography, strong remote focus, and backdrop atmosphere for movies, series and anime libraries.

vars.name: Projector amber
vars.description: Main focus and projection accent color.

vars.name: Soft amber
vars.description: Warm text and highlight color used around focused cards.

vars.name: Cue cyan
vars.description: Secondary cue light for focus and progress accents.

vars.name: Card focus scale
vars.description: Scale applied to regular home cards on hover/focus.

vars.name: Library focus scale
vars.description: Scale applied to My Media library cards on hover/focus.

vars.name: Card lift distance
vars.description: Vertical lift for regular home cards. Use CSS units, e.g. 0.45rem.

vars.name: Library lift distance
vars.description: Vertical lift for My Media library cards. Use CSS units, e.g. 0.65rem.

vars.name: Hide Next Up
vars.description: Hide the observed Next Up rail from the home screen. This depends on Jellyfin home order.

vars.name: Rename recent rails
vars.description: Visually show later home rail titles as Anadidos recientes. CSS-only fallback until a plugin home exists.

addons.name: Hide Next Up
addons.description: Hides the observed third home rail, currently A continuacion.

addons.name: Recent title fallback
addons.description: Visually changes later home rail titles to Anadidos recientes.
